title: Jad Doan
compiled_truth: Jad Doan is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2001-03-20 to 2002-03-29), Jad Doan sent 31 and received 121 emails, totalling 152 interactions. Top correspondents: [Edward Brady](people/edward-brady) (29), [Brad Jones](people/brad-jones) (27), [Lisa Kinsey](people/lisa-kinsey) (27), [Hal Mckinney](people/hal-mckinney) (27), [Denver Plachy](people/denver-plachy) (27). Mailbox folders observed: central, deleted_items, inbox.
